title: WCC 3 Waters Underground Services
description: Drinking water, wastewater, and stormwater underground infrastructure assets.
abstract: WCC 3 Waters Underground Services Asset Data exported from InfoAsset daily. For use in Wellington Water Internal maps and public facing maps. Drinking Water, wastewater stormwater. Mostly Council owned assets, but there are some privately owned assets in this data. Includes Abandoned & Removed assets.
provider: InfoAsset at Wellington Water Ltd daily
